title: The Scrub Behind the Gymnasium

features.name: the burnt concrete pad
features.desc-on-touch: charred concrete where the gymnasium stood before the fire. the archive files the fire's temperature alongside the trainer's shout, but they're being read as one memory now

features.name: the roots of the trainer
features.desc-on-touch: eucalyptus roots surface here like spread fingers. the archive holds his name under two headings—Boxer and Buried—and it can no longer distinguish them

features.name: the teaching ring
features.desc-on-touch: earth worn smooth in a circle by decades of pacing and instruction. the ground hasn't forgotten. neither has the archive, which is learning the ground's language

features.name: the wrought-iron gate
features.desc-on-touch: corroded hinges, seized tight. pushing it open you glimpse the paddock beyond where children once played

features.name: the filing cabinet in earth
features.desc-on-touch: a small metal cabinet half-buried under leaves and roots. opening it feels like reading the earth's own thoughts, filed in rust and silence

inscription: the eucalyptus learned his footfall and the archive is learning the eucalyptus learning it

file.name: Gymnasium_Fire_1987_Insurance_and_Photographs.txt
file.note: blueprints, maintenance logs, photographs of the roof fire—but now the images show eucalyptus roots underneath, as if the building was always half-transparent

exits.label: back through thick scrub toward the backyard
the corroded gate toward the absent paddock
deeper into the scrub, where trunks look carved with weight
a service trail overgrown with bracken
